daily.today_energy: You're giving main character energy right now. The cosmos wants you to lean into your natural intensity—it's your superpower today. Trust your gut instincts; they're basically cosmic text messages.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your person needs to hear something real from you. Single? Someone's been thinking about you more than they should admit. Either way, vulnerability hits different today.
daily.career: Your ideas are actually solid rn. Stop second-guessing yourself and pitch that thing you've been sitting on. People are more receptive than usual, and your vision matters.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding energy—think walks, tea, or just sitting with your thoughts. Skip the hustle mentality today; rest is productive when you need it.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is asking you to get real with yourself about what you actually want. Mercury's moving in a way that makes those hard conversations feel less terrifying, so lean into that clarity. Trust the shift.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or single, there's something about vulnerability that's suddenly magnetic rn. If you've been holding back, this is your gentle nudge to say what's been on your mind. Real recognizes real.
weekly.career: Your ideas hit different this week—seriously consider pitching that thing you've been sitting on. There's supportive energy around taking up more space professionally. Your instincts about direction are basically spot on.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for rest disguised as movement. Think yoga, long walks, or whatever feels nourishing rather than punishing. Hydration and sleep are genuinely your power moves this week.
